author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (Intel SVM + iommufd IoptPages):

- drivers/iommu/intel-svm.md: covers intel/svm.c (~240 lines) — Intel-specific SVM bind glue wiring per-mm-bound device into generic iommu-sva framework + per-PASID PT-root configuration via intel-pasid: bind requires SM (scalable mode) IOMMU + PASID/PRI/ATS device caps, intel_pasid_setup_first_level installs PASID-entry pointing at mm.pgd with FLPM/AW/DID/FLPTPTR fields, MMU notifier registered on bound mm covering [0, ULONG_MAX] dispatching qi_flush_iotlb_pasid + qi_flush_dev_iotlb_pasid on host pte change, per-PASID drain on mm exit via mmu_notifier_release, Sva::intel_unbind sequence (block new PRI → drain PRQ → tear-down PASID-entry → free PASID), per-IOMMU SVA domain shared across multi-device bindings. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (PASID-uniqueness + mm-UAF + PRQ-drain-termination + domain-attach-consistent) / Layer-2 ref to pasid_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus device↔CPU shared-pgd round-trip.
- drivers/iommu/iommufd-pages.md: covers iommufd/pages.c (~2500 lines, largest in iommufd/) — IoptPages reference-counted backing for USER (anon-mm-backed via pin_user_pages_remote) / FILE (tmpfs/hugetlbfs via per-file pin) / DMABUF (cross-driver dma-buf via attach + map_attachment) page sources, per-pages npinned counter bounded by RLIMIT_MEMLOCK + per-cgroup memory.lock_max, per-IoptArea access records via PagesAccess struct allowing incremental fill/unfill, IOMMU_IOAS_COPY zero-pin sharing via Arc refcount-bump only (no re-pin of source pages), iopt_pages_change_process re-attribution for vfio process-fork-then-rebind, COW tracking for file-backed writable pages, per-pages iova_bitmap covering full pages range for live-migration dirty-tracking, double-span interval-tree for O(log N) range queries on pin-state + access-state. 12 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + pin-unpin-balanced + account-balanced + COW-state-consistent) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus alloc→fill→DMA→unfill→Drop round-trip.

Total state: 280 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 46 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (46): + intel-svm + iommufd-pages. Reached 280-doc milestone.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-intel-svm, design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-pages.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/iommufd-vfio-compat status check (already exists, may pivot) — likely virt/kvm/coalesced-mmio.md (per-VM coalesced-MMIO ring for batched MMIO without vmexit-each) + drivers/iommu/iommufd-device.md (per-device iommufd binding lifecycle).
